name: Master of Love
short_description: Single and unemployed, 33-year-old Jun-Ho finds himself transported back in time ten years. He takes the chance to romance five women from his past – and get it right this time. Unlock five unique endings in Master of Love, an FMV game that offers the ultimate K-drama experience.
detailed_description:
Discord


Subreddit


About the Game

A failure at both love and career, Jun-Ho takes a bite of his 33rd birthday cake – and finds himself transported ten years into the past. This time around, can he get things right with at least one ex-girlfriend? Romance each old flame, make choices, and unlock different endings with: 

Runa: An innocent artist and his first love. A single misunderstanding led to their breakup. 

Yuri: The girl next door who gave Jun-Ho unconditional love. Unfortunately, she always viewed him as a brother. 

Hana: Jun-Ho’s colleague and secret office romance. Ambition and sabotage brought things to an end. 

Rahee: Dated Jun-Ho both before and after her big break into modeling. A public scandal ended their secret relationship.

Yiso: A successful career woman working at the same company as Jun-Ho. Business problems led to their downfall.

Key Features

  • Cinematic Experience: Unlike many Full Motion Video (FMV) games, Master of Love is told through a first-person perspective – unlocking the ultimate K-drama experience. 

  • Story Driven: Make choices in life and love to unlock five unique endings – each moving in their own way. 

  • 6+ hours of playtime: Immerse yourself in a detailed fantasy indistinguishable from real life.

  • Bonus Videos: Get to know the charming actors behind Master of Love.

supported_languages:
Korean*, English, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support
